hero.title: Smart Water Monitoring for Residential Buildings
hero.subtitle: Monitor cistern levels, anticipate shortages and keep residents informed with a clear web platform.

problem.title: Designed for buildings that depend on cisterns

cardOne.title: No real-time visibility
cardOne.content: Administrators usually check the cistern manually and react when the problem is already visible.

cardTwo.title: Unplanned shortages
cardTwo.content: Residents are affected when alerts arrive late and daily routines cannot be planned.

cardThree.title: Limited transparency
cardThree.content: Water expenses and refill decisions are difficult to explain without clear records.

workflow.title: Three steps to take control of the cistern

stepOne.title: Install the sensor
stepOne.content: Connect the device to the cistern to start recording the building's water level.

stepTwo.title: Monitor live
stepTwo.content: Review available level, estimated days and consumption from a simple administrator view.

stepThree.title: Act before shortages
stepThree.content: Receive alerts when the level drops and communicate with residents earlier.

savings.title: Reduce emergency purchases and improve planning
savings.subtitle: TankIQ turns cistern data into clear decisions to avoid late refills, resident complaints and unsupported expenses.

plans.title: Choose the right plan for your building

about.title: About TankIQ
about.content: TankIQ is a web application for smart water supply management in residential buildings that rely on cisterns.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Help administrators make informed decisions about water availability and reduce unnecessary refill costs.

value.title: Value proposition
value.content: A simple platform that combines monitoring, alerts and transparent information for administrators and residents.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.description: View key indicators and monitor the building's water availability.

alerts.title: Active alerts
alerts.unusualConsumptionDetail: On Monday consumption was 18% higher than average · check for leaks

monitoring.title: Water Monitoring
monitoring.description: Track water levels and estimated availability from a simple visual interface.
monitoring.currentStatusDescription: The cistern level is within the normal range. This screen is ready for sensor or json-server data integration.

mock.title: Mock sensor data
mock.description: Temporary values prepared for json-server integration and later backend connection.

alerts.title: Alerts & Notifications
alerts.description: Review alerts related to critical levels, unusual consumption and supply events.

sample.lowDescription: The system can notify the administrator before the cistern reaches a critical level.
sample.resolvedDescription: This placeholder confirms how resolved events will appear in the alert history.

underConstruction.title: Feature under construction
underConstruction.description: This module is connected to the application routes and will be implemented by the assigned feature team.

page-not-found.content: The path {{ invalid_path }} is not valid.

footer.description: Smart cistern monitoring for residential buildings.
